name: Chocolate Spritz Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels (6 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Over hot (not boiling) water, melt Nestle Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels and stir until smooth. Set aside to cool slightly.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, sugar, and vanilla extract until creamy.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in the melted chocolate. Gradually add flour, stirring just until combined. Cover dough with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30-45 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
5. Load cookie press with star plates and place onto ungreased cookie sheets. Press dough into 2-inch circles.
6. Decorate each circle with a cinnamon candy placed on top of the dough.
7. Bake for 5 minutes or until set, then let cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. This recipe yields about 7 1/2 dozen cookies.
